title: C-5 protocol droid
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''C-5 [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]''' was a household [[Droid/Legends|droid]] programmed with many functions and forms of communication. It was manufactured by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] on the factory moon of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]]. It was the predecessor of the [[C-6 protocol droid]] and the successor of the [[C-4 protocol droid]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]''
